args.name: payment
args.desc: - the payment for purchasing the asset

methods.name: delist
methods.desc: Deletes the app and returns the asset/mbr to the seller

methods.name: optin

args.name: asset
args.desc: The asset to be opted into

methods.desc: optin tells the contract to opt into an asa

prize.desc: the asset for sale: Asset | Application ( Prize Box )

isPrizeBox.desc: whether or not the prize is an asset or a prize box

paymentAsset.desc: the asset to use for payment

expiration.desc: the timestamp the listing expires on, once this passes all that can be done is delist

reservedFor.desc: the address the sale is reserved for

creatorRoyalty.desc: the amount the creator will get for the sale

gateID.desc: the gate ID to use to check if the user is qualified to buy

marketplace.desc:
The address of the marketplace that listed the asset to send the fee to

IMPORTANT: this is a double sided marketplace fee contract
the marketplace referred to internally in the contract
is the listing side marketplace.
the buyer side marketplace provides their address at
the time of purchase

marketplaceRoyalties.desc: the amount the marketplaces will get for the sale

akitaDAOEscrow.desc: the app ID for the akita DAO escrow

version.desc: the current version of the contract

akitaDAO.desc: the app ID of the Akita DAO
